content: .NET namespace/project rename: No dedicated dotnet CLI command. Steps: (1) rename folder, (2) rename .csproj file, (3) update .slnx to point to new path, (4) change <RootNamespace> in csproj if set (not required if csproj name matches namespace), (5) global find+replace all using statements and namespace declarations. VS 2022 'Sync Namespaces' feature automates step 5. Third-party tool ModernRonin.ProjectRenamer (dotnet tool install -g ModernRonin.ProjectRenamer) automates all steps from CLI. Migrations history in EF Core is unaffected by namespace rename (stored in DB). Integration test WebApplicationFactory references project assembly — must update its generic type arg namespace after rename.
